title: Automation sharing location
excerpt:
Hello, 
It would be useful to be able to turn on /off the sharing location function (available on the location column on mobile) using an automation. 
When status changes > start/stop sharing location.

posts.author: Krunchy (Guillaume Servonnat)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

It would be useful to be able to turn on /off the sharing location function (available on the location column on mobile) using an automation.
When status changes > start/stop sharing location.
Any interest for the community ?
